data.title: 国际服网页活动「My Office (Beta)」
data.summary: [“My Office (Beta)” Webpage Now Open + Special Opening Event!] Sensei! Your very own mini office, My
data.body:
[“My Office (Beta)” Webpage Now Open + Special Opening Event!]

Sensei! Your very own mini office, My Office, has now opened~
In the lobby of My Office, you can check out the latest Blue Archive news from the students, take on exclusive missions, and claim special rewards!

There’s also a Collection Page where you can view student messages and cards, a Card Machine where you can collect new cards, and the Jellys Arcade where you can revisit past web mini-games!

A special event is now live to celebrate the opening, so don’t miss out—visit My Office today! ✨

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3303922
![G8RiOeGa4AE6vP6.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/i4iDkkftxZspuWwEYZyISly3tOs2OA5X.jpg)
